docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF A1 AABATEMENT GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED NORMAN BAUTISTA, CEO. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DESIGN BUILD IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN CARTA, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT AILEEN NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WITNESS: RUDY DECAMPO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON AILEEN NGUYEN. ***AILEEN NGUYEN WAIVES SERVICE.*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A1 ABATEMENT GROUP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DESIGN BUILD NGUYEN, AILEEN $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,950.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-25-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DESIGN BUILD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NORMAN BAUTISTA, CEO FILED BY PLAINTIFF A1 ABATEMENT GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JONATHAN CARTA, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DESIGN BUILD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,850.00 FILED BY A1 ABATEMENT GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DESIGN BUILD NGUYEN, AILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5626401D006, TAG # 038358 BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, AILEEN
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, AILEEN
JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF A1 ABATEMENT GROUP, INC. COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING
